name: Possession App (V1)
description:
A mysterious app glitches onto your phone—no icon, no download history, just a blank screen waiting for your command. With a single word, reality shifts: your consciousness slides into someone else’s skin, their body now yours to control. The rules are simple, the consequences are not.

Welcome to Blackwood High, where every host comes with their own secrets, quirks, and limitations.

The app doesn’t explain why this is happening. It doesn’t care if you get caught. All it does is obey—one command at a time.

Will you play it safe? Or will you dig deeper, testing how far a borrowed body can bend before it—or the world around you—breaks?

Rules are absolute. Possession is effortless. Consequences? Inevitable.

PFP SOURCE
creator: lunarx
